name: Eggplant Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a covered saucepan, cook the eggplant in a small amount of boiling water until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
2. Drain and mash the eggplant.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients except the oil.
4. Shape into patties.
5. Fry in hot oil until golden brown, about 5 minutes on each side.
